title: マッスル・ジェラシー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while Mejiro Ryan is doing some
strength training in the gym...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oof... I can really feel that burn!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: My biceps are on fire! This is what a dumbbell workout is all about!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yep! With nothing but running on the menu
lately, I've been neglecting my upper body
workouts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm focusing on my arms, shoulders,
and back today, to give them the attention
they—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Guess it's time for strength training.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I know I need to keep up with it... but it's just so
hard.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh, excuse me, Trainer. Just give me a
minute!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Nature! Why don't we train together? If you
want to, that is.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, R-Ryan?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, just a couple more reps! Keep it going!
Twenty-eight!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Twenty-nine! ...Thirty!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huff... Finally, I'm done! I don't think I could muster up the strength for even one more...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
All right, great job! Those were some real nice
push-ups!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Upper body strength is important for swinging
your arms when running and maintaining your
core, so working out is—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Important, right? My teacher said so too...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yep. But that's all just theory. The first thing
about strength training is feeling it with your own
body!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Can't you feel it right now? Those upper arms feel
happy, don't they?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...You're asking if my arms are happy?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you're kidding... right? All that my arms
feel is tuckered out.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... They're tired, but actually... they don't
feel half bad.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's what I'm talking about! If you're only
running, all those unused muscles of yours will get
jealous and start sulking.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But if you give them attention... then they'll start
feelin' cheery, like they do right now!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Come on, my muscles are cheery? Well, they certainly don't feel bad...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha! That's what makes working out fun! I'll
teach you some other exercises too!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
W-well... I guess seeing a few more would be
okay.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Then next up we should...
choice_data_list: Let's keep pushing it to the limit!
You should teach her some theory first!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You're right! The essence of muscle training is to
go beyond the limits of your own body.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You gotta know your limit today... so you can
surpass yourself tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Nature, it's going to be a little tough. Think you
can keep up?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: My limit?! Wait, I wasn't really thinking about going that far...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Don't you worry, you can trust me! All right, let's
do this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: One for muscle, all for muscle!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: One for muscle, all for muscle!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Huh! Oh my, I just shouted... Wh-what's gotten
into me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The pair continue to challenge themselves to go
beyond their limits!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You've got a major point. The right workout
needs the right theory!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, you two, let's do this. First, you gotta
memorize the names of the muscles and where
they are on your body.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The muscles I'm flexing here... they're the
rhomboids!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: The rhomboids! Got it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: And here we have... the erector spinae!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: E-erector... s-spinae!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Very good! Let's make all the muscles in our
bodies happy now!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uh... How do I do that?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Soon after, Mejiro Ryan's muscle training method
becomes famous at the gym.
